bugs_found.summary: Skyflow CVV-only COMPOSABLE container collapses to 0px height after switching from 'Add new card' back to saved card — blocks saved card payment
bugs_found.root_cause: PR #2212 changed CVV-only form from COLLECT to COMPOSABLE container type; mount/unmount lifecycle broken
bugs_found.repro: Payment page → saved card → Add new card → switch back to saved card → CVV input invisible

bugs_found.summary: Skyflow CVV-only iframe shows white background leak in dark mode — iframe body background not set
bugs_found.root_cause: Skyflow SDK applies background to inner container div, not iframe body/html elements

bugs_found.summary: Skyflow postMessage cross-origin errors on every iframe mount — origin mismatch between storefront and js.skyflow.com
bugs_found.root_cause: May pre-date PR #2212; correlates with CVV container mount failure

exploratory.charter: Payment form iframe dark theme — theme toggling, card switching, mount/unmount edge cases
